title: crucifera amphibia
intro: Crucifera amphibia, also known as watercress, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, making it a popular herb for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and fighting cancer cells. The health benefits of watercress include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting eye health. Watercress can be consumed as a raw addition to salads, smoothies, or juices, or it can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water.
